title: Sub Item Buttons & Email & Formulas That Reference Parent Item
excerpt: Enhance subitem functionality to include additional features, including the ability to trigger actions via a button click, the ability to send emails, formulas at the subitem level that references parent Item information…

posts.author: taz101108 (Jennifer Erickson)
posts.cookedHtml: Enhance subitem functionality to include additional features, including the ability to trigger actions via a button click, the ability to send emails, formulas at the subitem level that references parent Item information.
